top_signals.title: CNBC Daily Open: 'Strategic triangle' put to the test
top_signals.summary: Russian President Vladimir Putin visits Beijing, hoping to secure ties with China and clinch crucial energy deals.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Wembanyama dazzles as Spurs top Thunder in double-overtime thriller
top_signals.summary: The French star played 49 minutes, producing a pair of dunks and a crucial block late in the second overtime to seal the victory.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
